title: Kores - Neon Highlighter Pens - Fine High Liner, Neon, Water Based-Ink Highlighter Pen with Ergonomic Shape, Chisel Tip - Stationery School Supplies, Office Supplies - Pack of 4 in Assorted Colours
features: HIGHLINER: The Kores Highliner offers a pack of 4 neon highlighter pens in vibrant colours, universal water-based ink, and an ergonomic shape—ideal for both office and stationery essentials.

VIBRANT AND PRECISE: Enjoy a vivid neon colour, perfect for clearly emphasising important text and creating an organised, colour-coded system. Features a patented cap design and water-based ink designed to minimise bleed-through, ensuring your notes remain crisp, legible, and free of unsightly marks.

PEN-SHAPED: This highlighter boasts an ergonomic shape that fits naturally in your hand, allowing for comfortable use during extended writing sessions. Beyond its comfort, it excels in versatility, making it ideal for highlighting on a wide range of surfaces such as paper, photocopies, and fax printouts.

CHISEL TIP: This highlighter is equipped with a durable 1-4mm chisel tip that offers precision and versatility for both students and professionals. It provides both broad and fine lines, making it perfect for accurate highlighting and underlining.

NON-TOXIC INK: Enjoy comfort with this highlighter with a unique and patented design cap, ideal for extended use. This highlighter is filled with an intensely coloured non-toxic ink designed for extended writing length and a long cap-off time, ensuring durability and a longer lifespan for all your highlighting needs.
description: From the manufacturer Kores - Highlighting Highlight the essential with trendy Kores text markers! Highlighting Patented smart design & trendy colours make Kores textmarkers a highlight among stationery supplies. Kores highlighting range features diverse ergonomic shapes from pen-shaped to pocket-sized flat ones to match your individual needs. The wide selection of neon and pastel colours makes highlighted text pop and draw attention to the most essential. Kores highlighter pens are a must-have to make a learning process at school easy, exciting and fun or to boost efficiency while working with texts and documents in the office. High Liner Plus Mark the difference with Kores High Liner Plus! These classy text markers will not only emphasize the most improtant information in any text, but also accentuate your special sense of style. Their unique modern pen-shaped design is patented by Kores. These chunky big highlighters will help you out during studying marathon and exams preparation, as well as pick out the take-home message of any book. High Liner Make your essential text pop anywhere you are with elegant Kores High Liner highlighter pens ! Slim pen-shaped highlighters are not only easy to grip, but they are also a great fit for any pencil case. These markers take up less space in your pouch so you can carry several colours with you and colour-code anywhere. The cap fits conveniently on the end when highlighting thus keeping the rear end of the marker and your hands clean and tidy. With their stylish and functional design, these highlighter pens will become a jewel on any desk. Bright Liner Plus Brighten up your day with Kores Bright Liner Plus text markers! Ergonomic flat-shaped Kores highlighters fit even small hands easily and are pleasant to the touch. With their textured grip zone these text markers are easy to hold and enable you a better control over the line width. Compact design and cute pocket size make these highlighter pens handy helper anytime anywhere you should need it. Free your ideas. ​ Kores was founded in 1887 in Austria and has been one of the most important brand in the school and office range ever since. A family-run company in the fourth generation producing innovative and high-quality tools that help you free your ideas. With emphasis on sustainability, Kores is represented worldwide with over 580 products that are designed in Vienna, Austria. ​ High Liner Plus High Liner Plus Pastel High Liner High Liner Pastel Bright Liner Plus Bright Liner Plus Pastel Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 312 4.4 out of 5 stars 312 4.3 out of 5 stars 81 4.5 out of 5 stars 3,073 4.5 out of 5 stars 302 4.5 out of 5 stars 302 Price £3.96 £ 3 . 96 £4.71 £ 4 . 71 £4.26 £ 4 . 26 £4.34 £ 4 . 34 £4.31 £ 4 . 31 £5.84 £ 5 . 84 Point type Chisel Chisel Chisel Chisel Chisel Chisel Writing line width (approx.) 1-5 mm 1-5 mm 1-5 mm 1-5 mm 1-5 mm 1-5 mm Water based ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Non toxic ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Suitable for All kinds of paper, incl. copy, ink jet print outs and fax All kinds of paper, incl. copy, ink jet print outs and fax All kinds of paper, incl. copy, ink jet print outs and fax All kinds of paper, incl. copy, ink jet print outs and fax All kinds of paper, incl. copy, ink jet print outs and fax All kinds of paper, incl. copy, ink jet print outs and fax Available ink colours 4 neon colours 6 pastel colours 4 neon colours 6 pastel colours 6 pastel colours 6 pastel colours Available pack sizes Pack x1, Set x4, Box x12 Set x6 Set x4, Box x12 Set x6 Pack x1, Set x2, Set x4, Set x6 Set x6 Features Unique pen-shaped design patented by Kores; Intense & consistent colour brilliancy Unique pen-shaped design patented by Kores; Trendy pastel colours Unique slim pen-shaped design patented by Kores; Intense & consistent colour brilliancy Unique slim pen-shaped design patented by Kores; Trendy pastel colours Pocket-sized flat textmarkers with comfortable grip zone; Bright and intense colours; Twist-off cap with a wide clip Pocket-sized flat textmarkers with comfortable grip zone; Trendy pastel colours; Twist-off cap with a wide clip
